arts.ttl: Arsenal’s dangerous weapon provides first real twist in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Arsenal 2-0 Manchester United: Jurrien Timber and William Saliba scored from set pieces in a fine win over Ruben Amorim’s United

arts.ttl: 'Not good enough' - Matthijs de Ligt shows true colours after Manchester United loss vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Man Utd lost 2-0 against Arsenal in the Premier League on Wednesday and De Ligt reflected on the performance.

arts.ttl: Arsenal send title warning as Ruben Amorim proved spot on after first Man Utd defeat
arts.sum: ARSENAL 2-0 MAN UTD: Mikel Arteta's side now look in the mood to take their fight for a first Premier League title in two decades the distance on a night that Liverpool finally dropped points

arts.ttl: Roy Keane slams Marcus Rashford during The Overlap's watch-along coverage of Man United's 2-0 defeat at Arsenal as he claims the forward's 'general play as a footballer is shocking'
arts.sum: Rashford began the game on the bench before entering the action as a substitute on 58 minutes. He touched the ball 22 times during his cameo and failed to produce any shots or key passes.

arts.ttl: I saw Manchester United plan for Arsenal threat - it turned out to be a waste of time
arts.sum: Man Utd lost 2-0 to Arsenal at the Emirates and both goals came from a predictable route for the hosts and one that Ruben Amorim's team had planned for.

A clever free-kick by Fernandes led to Antony forcing another save out of Raya but another huge scare from a corner at the other end, when Onana just about did enough to get it away from danger, was more instructive about a disappointing defeat. Onana saved from Saka but the offside flag was up anyway before we managed to clear our heads.

arts.ttl: Corners do the damage as Arsenal condemn Ruben Amorim to first Man Utd defeat
arts.sum: Jurrien Timber and William Saliba scored for the Gunners.

arts.ttl: Manchester City and Arsenal win as leaders Liverpool held at Newcastle
arts.sum: Liverpool’s draw allowed Arsenal to cut the gap at the top of the table to seven points.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 2-0 Man Utd: Player ratings as Gunners lean on set-piece strength to inflict defeat on Amorim
arts.sum: Player ratings from the Premier League clash between Arsenal and Man Utd at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans are making the same point about William Saliba after win over Manchester United
arts.sum: Arsenal recorded a routine 2-0 win over Manchester United on Wednesday night to narrow the gap on Premier League leaders Liverpool to seven points. Mikel...
